description_long: This is a modern swivel chair with a high, slightly contoured backrest and a generously padded seat, both upholstered in a dark, textured fabric. The backrest features two decorative fabric ties on the rear and four subtle button tufts on the front, adding a touch of visual interest. The chair is supported by a sturdy, black, five-legged star base equipped with smooth-rolling casters for easy mobility. A central cylindrical support column connects the seat to the base, likely allowing for height adjustment, though no adjustment levers are visible. The chair lacks armrests, giving it a minimalist and streamlined appearance. Its overall design is functional and comfortable, suitable for office or home workspace environments.
description: A high-back, armless swivel chair with dark fabric upholstery, button tufting, and a five-caster black base. Decorative ties accent the back, and the design is sleek and modern.
description_view_0: Side view showing the chair's thick seat cushion, tall backrest, and the central support column with five caster legs.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the two decorative fabric ties and the full, smooth backrest surface.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the seat and backrest profile with the support column and casters.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the button-tufted backrest, wide seat, and the symmetrical five-caster base.
attribute_central_support_column: A black cylindrical metal column, likely telescoping, connecting the seat to the five-legged caster base.
attribute_seat_back_design: Tall, rectangular, gently contoured backrest with dark fabric upholstery, four button tufts on the front, and two decorative fabric ties on the rear.
